title: symplocos macrophylla var. cuneata
intro: Symplocos macrophylla var. cuneata, also known as the Indian alder or Chinese alder, is a plant species native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Symplocos macrophylla var. cuneata include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
